catalogData.name: Strength
properties: Unphased (can't gain Frightened or Wounded status)

powers.name: Animal Form
powers.raw: Animal Form (Major Action, Sustained): Change into animal totem. Retain stats, but can't use attacks/powers.
powers.text: Change into animal totem. Retain stats, but can't use attacks/powers.

powers.name: Crush
powers.raw: Crush (Complex Action): Cast Shatter at Force. Only targets objects.
powers.text: Cast Shatter at Force. Only targets objects.

powers.name: Enhance Strength
powers.raw: Enhance Strength (Complex Action, Sustained): Cast Strengthen at Force, but can't target self
powers.text: Cast Strengthen at Force, but can't target self

powers.name: Primary Spell
powers.raw: Primary Spell (Complex Action, Sustained): Cast Resist Pain at Force

powers.name: Share Strength
powers.raw: Share Strength (Major Action): Target gains +Force/2 bonus to Physical and Stun Health
powers.text: Target gains +Force/2 bonus to Physical and Stun Health

powers.name: Skill Guidance
powers.raw: Skill Guidance (Complex Action, Sustained): Target gains +2 augmentation bonus to Athletics or Close Combat if unaugmented skill ≤ Force
powers.text: Target gains +2 augmentation bonus to Athletics or Close Combat if unaugmented skill ≤ Force

greatFormPowers.name: Restrain
greatFormPowers.raw: Restrain (Complex Action): Cast Paralyze at Force, don't sustain. Ends if target takes damage.
greatFormPowers.text: Cast Paralyze at Force, don't sustain. Ends if target takes damage.
